case_title: DISCOVER BANK VS. MARCEL OSPITAL et al

RECEIVED REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT/DEFAULT JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF DISCOVER BANK AS TO DEFENDANT AZCONA, MARIE H.
ABSTRACT OF JUDGMENT ISSUED TO PLAINTIFF DISCOVER BANK

EXEMPT COLLECTIONS (RULE 3.740), COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF DISCOVER BANK AS TO DEFENDANT OSPITAL, MARCEL AZCONA, MARIE H. DOES 1 TO 5, INCL. SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  OCT-09-2012
AMENDED SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT, PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PLAINTIFF DISCOVER BANK SERVED APR-22-2012, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT AZCONA, MARIE H.
DISMISSAL WITHOUT PREJUDICE OF COMPLAINT AS TO DEFENDANT OSPITAL, MARCEL DOES 1 TO 5, INCL.
REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT/DEFAULT ENTERED, CLERK'S JUDGMENT REQUESTED, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS, COST BILL $339.00 FILED, CREDIT ACKNOWLEDGED $.00 AS TO DEFENDANT AZCONA, MARIE H.

DECLARATION IN SUPPORT OF ORDER ADMITTING COPIES INTO EVIDENCE IN LIEU OF ORIGINALS FILED BY PLAINTIFF DISCOVER BANK

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF DISCOVER BANK RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT AZCONA, MARIE H. $3,781.79 PRINCIPAL, $339.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $4,120.79, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR JAN-29-2013 IN DEPARTMENT 610 AT 10:30 AM FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF(S) OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) MARCEL OSPITAL. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE OF JAN-29-2013 IS OFF CALENDAR. JUDGMENT ON FILE. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
